form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months 5th of 7 at this track Hcp on March 24 over 1100m, slow going 5.5 len behind Pride Of Venus carrying 64kg at $31. Previously second-up ran last of 14 at Mackay Qlty on July 11 over 1300m, on a slow track; 8 len behind Real Key with 56.5kg at $18. No easier this time and is likely to struggle.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation fourth of 10 at Townsville Hcp October 5 over 1200m, 2.75 len behind Missile Thunder with 58.5kg at $3.70. First up last campaign second in a small field at this track Mayors Cup April 12 over 1200m, soft track; a nose behind Hellish carrying 56.5kg at $1.65. Expecting a bold return.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 57-day let-up. First-up after five months favourite; settled well back; won by a head at Mackay Hcp February 13 over 1100m defeating Answering with 56.5kg at $1.55. Previously second-up favourite; won by 1.2 len at Mackay 3&4yo Hcp June 5 over 1560m defeating Me Time with 62kg at $1.16. Harder here and looks safely held.
